title: The TBU Pack
description: A Modpack that features mostly only client-sided mod for a specific Server
body:
# Introduction

This Modpack is designed to be used with the TBU-Server, but it can also be used in Singleplayer or even to self-host a server. It doesn't provide any gameplay changing mods, only quality of life enhancements and visual overhauls. This Modpack aims to refresh the vanilla Minecraft Experience.

# Credits:
- [Excalibur](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/excalibur/), a wonderful medieval themed Resource Pack
- [Fabric Friendly Excalibur](https://discord.com/channels/541420469119877120/798331315488817153/1035728454202703972), makes Excalibur work with fabric! Thanks GrandPappyJay

# Modcs

- Performance
  - Sodium
  - Indium
  - Ferrite Core
- Visuals
  - Visuality
  - Better Animation Collection
  - Camera Overhaul
- Quality of Life
  - Right Click Harvest
  - Pick Up Notifier
  - Mouse Wheelie
  - Jade
- Social
  - Simple Voice Chat
